message:
🐛 Remove artifacts link from failed dot hover (404s) (#1124)

The /artifacts URL 404s — the logs page already has both logs and
artifacts. Keep only "View Logs" link in card and widget.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -116,18 +116,11 @@ function RunDot({ run, isHighlighted, onMouseEnter, onMouseLeave }: {
Run #{run.runNumber} · {isGPUFailure ? GPU unavailable : failed} · {formatTimeAgo(run.createdAt)}
-
- e.stopPropagation()}> - View Logs - - e.stopPropagation()}> - Artifacts - -
+ e.stopPropagation()}> + View Logs +
